subcodes.first_line: O My leaves and handmaidens! Today the Breeze of God is wafting and the Spirit of God is astir [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اوراقی و امائی امروز نسمه الله در مرور و روح الله در حرکت
subcodes.subjects: @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
